mapper.sql: order_no, user_id, role_id, srv_id, goods_id, goods_type, goods_ext, goods_name, goods_cfg, total_fee, item_id, game_money, ext_param, sign_type, sign, add_time, status, src, money_type,notify_time,notify_id,trade_no,trade_status,totalRecharge,totalVipPower
mapper.select:
select
distinct
'true' as QUERYID,
,
from recharge
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
'true' as QUERYID,
from recharge
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into recharge (order_no, user_id, role_id, srv_id, goods_id, goods_type, goods_ext, goods_name, goods_cfg, total_fee, item_id, game_money, ext_param, sign_type, sign, add_time, status, src, data, money_type,notify_time,notify_id,trade_no,trade_status,totalRecharge,totalVipPower) values (#{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{srvId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{goodsId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{goodsType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{goodsExt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{goodsCfg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totalFee,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{itemId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{gameMoney,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{extParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{signType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sign,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{src,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{data,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{moneyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{notify_time,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{notify_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trade_no,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{trade_status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{totalRecharge,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{totalVipPower,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into recharge
order_no,
user_id,
role_id,
srv_id,
goods_id,
goods_type,
goods_ext,
goods_name,
goods_cfg,
total_fee,
item_id,
game_money,
ext_param,
sign_type,
sign,
add_time,
status,
src,
data,
money_type,
notify_time,
notify_id,
trade_no,
trade_status,
totalRecharge,
totalVipPower,
#{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{srvId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{goodsId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{goodsType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{goodsExt,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{goodsCfg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{totalFee,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{itemId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{gameMoney,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{extParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{signType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sign,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{addTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{src,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{data,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{moneyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{notify_time,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{notify_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{trade_no,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{trade_status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{totalRecharge,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{totalVipPower,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update recharge
order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
role_id = #{record.roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
srv_id = #{record.srvId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
goods_id = #{record.goodsId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
goods_type = #{record.goodsType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goods_ext = #{record.goodsExt,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goods_name = #{record.goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goods_cfg = #{record.goodsCfg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
total_fee = #{record.totalFee,jdbcType=INTEGER},
item_id = #{record.itemId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
game_money = #{record.gameMoney,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ext_param = #{record.extParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sign_type = #{record.signType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sign = #{record.sign,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
add_time = #{record.addTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
src = #{record.src,jdbcType=TINYINT},
data = #{record.data,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
money_type = #{record.moneyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
notify_time = #{record.notify_time,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
notify_id = #{record.notify_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trade_no = #{record.trade_no,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trade_status = #{record.trade_status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
totalRecharge = #{record.totalRecharge,jdbcType=INTEGER},
totalVipPower = #{record.totalVipPower,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update recharge set order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, role_id = #{record.roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, srv_id = #{record.srvId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, goods_id = #{record.goodsId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, goods_type = #{record.goodsType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goods_ext = #{record.goodsExt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goods_name = #{record.goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goods_cfg = #{record.goodsCfg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, total_fee = #{record.totalFee,jdbcType=INTEGER}, item_id = #{record.itemId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, game_money = #{record.gameMoney,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ext_param = #{record.extParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sign_type = #{record.signType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sign = #{record.sign,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, add_time = #{record.addTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, src = #{record.src,jdbcType=TINYINT}, data = #{record.data,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, notify_time = #{record.notify_time,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, notify_id = #{record.notify_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trade_no = #{record.trade_no,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trade_status = #{record.trade_status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, totalRecharge = #{record.totalRecharge,jdbcType=INTEGER}, totalVipPower = #{record.totalVipPower,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update recharge set order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, role_id = #{record.roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, srv_id = #{record.srvId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, goods_id = #{record.goodsId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, goods_type = #{record.goodsType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goods_ext = #{record.goodsExt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goods_name = #{record.goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goods_cfg = #{record.goodsCfg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, total_fee = #{record.totalFee,jdbcType=INTEGER}, item_id = #{record.itemId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, game_money = #{record.gameMoney,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ext_param = #{record.extParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sign_type = #{record.signType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sign = #{record.sign,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, add_time = #{record.addTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, src = #{record.src,jdbcType=TINYINT}, money_type = #{record.moneyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, notify_time = #{record.notify_time,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, notify_id = #{record.notify_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trade_no = #{record.trade_no,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trade_status = #{record.trade_status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, totalRecharge = #{record.totalRecharge,jdbcType=INTEGER}, totalVipPower = #{record.totalVipPower,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update recharge
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
role_id = #{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
srv_id = #{srvId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
goods_id = #{goodsId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
goods_type = #{goodsType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goods_ext = #{goodsExt,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goods_name = #{goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goods_cfg = #{goodsCfg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
total_fee = #{totalFee,jdbcType=INTEGER},
item_id = #{itemId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
game_money = #{gameMoney,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ext_param = #{extParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sign_type = #{signType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sign = #{sign,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
add_time = #{addTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
src = #{src,jdbcType=TINYINT},
data = #{data,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
money_type = #{moneyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
notify_time = #{notify_time,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
notify_id = #{notify_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trade_no = #{trade_no,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trade_status = #{trade_status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
totalRecharge = #{totalRecharge,jdbcType=INTEGER},
totalVipPower = #{totalVipPower,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update recharge set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, role_id = #{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, srv_id = #{srvId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, goods_id = #{goodsId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, goods_type = #{goodsType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goods_ext = #{goodsExt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goods_name = #{goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goods_cfg = #{goodsCfg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, total_fee = #{totalFee,jdbcType=INTEGER}, item_id = #{itemId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, game_money = #{gameMoney,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ext_param = #{extParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sign_type = #{signType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sign = #{sign,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, add_time = #{addTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, src = #{src,jdbcType=TINYINT}, data = #{data,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, money_type = #{moneyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, notify_time = #{notify_time,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, notify_id = #{notify_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trade_no = #{trade_no,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trade_status = #{trade_status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, totalRecharge = #{totalRecharge,jdbcType=INTEGER}, totalVipPower = #{totalVipPower,jdbcType=INTEGER} where order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update recharge set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, role_id = #{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, srv_id = #{srvId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, goods_id = #{goodsId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, goods_type = #{goodsType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goods_ext = #{goodsExt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goods_name = #{goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goods_cfg = #{goodsCfg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, total_fee = #{totalFee,jdbcType=INTEGER}, item_id = #{itemId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, game_money = #{gameMoney,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ext_param = #{extParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sign_type = #{signType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sign = #{sign,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, add_time = #{addTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, src = #{src,jdbcType=TINYINT} money_type = #{moneyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, notify_time = #{notify_time,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, notify_id = #{notify_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trade_no = #{trade_no,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trade_status = #{trade_status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, totalRecharge = #{totalRecharge,jdbcType=INTEGER}, totalVipPower = #{totalVipPower,jdbcType=INTEGER} where order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
